zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Corbet於大約1190年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾時，他的父親Sir Robert Corbet11188歲，母親Emma de Pantulf30歲。他於大約1220年與Ada在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1254年在英國武斯特斯爾享年65歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Corbet was born about 1190, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert Corbet, was 11188 and his mother, Emma de Pantulf, was 30. He married Ada about 1220, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1254, in Worcestershire, England, at the age of 65.

Il a épousé Ada environ 1220, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1254, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Corbetが約1190年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Corbetは11188歳，母Emma de Pantulfは30歳であった。約1220年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでAdaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1254年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Corbet(이)가 대략 1190년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Corbet(은)는 11188세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Pantulf(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 Ada(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1254년 영국 워스스터실르에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.
